author: Dr15Jones
body:
#### PR description:

- needs to take into account callID.
- can handle out of time order entries in log for the same module

#### PR validation:

A log file which could not be parsed previously can now be parsed.

resolves #51096 
resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2262
title: fix json dump in edmModuleAllocMonitorAnalyze.py
